name: Atotech Deutschland GmbH & Co. KG
h1: Atotech Deutschland's GCC footprint in India
lede: Atotech Deutschland runs three capability centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram and Mumbai, covering R&D and sales & marketing, built over 36 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atotech Deutschland office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atotech Deutschland GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atotech Deutschland runs 3 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Mumbai), covering R&D and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

about.description: Atotech Deutschland's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram and Mumbai, spanning R&D and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nine decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atotech Deutschland operate in India?
faq.a: Atotech Deutschland operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atotech Deutschland have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atotech Deutschland's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Gurugram and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atotech Deutschland run in India?
faq.a: Atotech Deutschland runs R&D and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atotech Deutschland's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atotech Deutschland's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atotech Deutschland's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 9 leaders at Atotech Deutschland's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
